seo.title: Lawyer in Township Lahore: Family & Property
seo.description: Lawyer in Township Lahore for khula, divorce, child custody, rental ejectment and small property disputes. Saeed Law Firm has served Township families since 1975.

hero.intro: Most people in Township who need a lawyer in Township Lahore need one for an ordinary, urgent household problem: a khula that has to be filed, a tenant who will not leave, a maintenance payment that has stopped, a small plot a relative is trying to grab. Saeed Law Firm has served Township's working and middle-class families for 50 years.

bodyMarkdown:
Most people in Township who need a lawyer need one for an ordinary, urgent household problem: a khula that has to be filed, a tenant who will not leave, a maintenance payment that has stopped, a small plot a relative is trying to grab. Saeed Law Firm has served Township's working and middle-class families for 50 years.

Township is an LDA-developed residential scheme organised into numbered sectors in the south-western part of Lahore, off Ferozepur Road and Ghazi Road, adjacent to Green Town and near the Faisal Town and Johar Town corridor. The residents are predominantly working-class and middle-class families in compact residential blocks with small shops and schools scattered across the sectors. Because the scheme is mixed residential and rental, and because properties are often held across multiple heirs or bought and sold informally, the legal work here is almost all everyday: khula and divorce, child custody and maintenance, tenancy disputes, small-plot property transfers, and boundary or succession quarrels.

### Family disputes and khula at Family Courts

Family matters are the core work for a [lawyer in Township Lahore](/lawyer-in-township-lahore). Khula (wife-initiated dissolution) under the Muslim Family Laws Ordinance 1961 is common here, especially where maintenance has lapsed or where a husband is absent or incapacitated. Divorce, child custody, dower recovery, and maintenance orders are all heard at the Family Courts complex at Aiwan-e-Adal on Mall Road. Contested khula cases run longer than uncontested ones. Many Township cases settle through negotiated nikahnaamas or registered khula deeds, avoiding full litigation. See our [family lawyer in Lahore](/family-lawyer-in-lahore) page for procedure and guidance.

### Tenancy and ejectment under the Punjab Rented Premises Act

Township has significant rental stock. Ejectment suits for non-payment, material breach (such as subletting without consent), or personal need are filed at [Civil Court Lahore](/civil-lawyer-in-lahore). Most cases turn on whether rent is owed; if the tenant disputes this, the court will need time to hear both sides before ordering eviction. Informal oral tenancies are common in Township, and proving the monthly rate and arrears can move slowly. Once an ejectment decree is issued, you must still apply for physical possession, which adds further time. See our [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore) page for ejectment procedure in depth.

### Property disputes: transfer, mutation, and boundary

LDA plots are frequently bought and sold with minimal paperwork. Common disputes arise when a buyer pays earnest money and the seller refuses to register the sale, or when an inherited plot is held by multiple co-heirs who cannot agree on use or sale. Mutation (intiqal) following sale or inheritance is filed at the District Revenue Office (tehsil). Boundary disputes between neighbours over an encroaching wall or fence are filed as suits at Civil Court Lahore. Declaration suits (to clarify who owns what) are common when a plot has been possessed by one family for years without formal title. These cases proceed through [District Courts Lahore](/courts/district-court-lawyer-lahore) and can take considerable time if there are many witnesses or competing claims.

### How to start: documents and first consultation

Bring any documents you have: sale deeds, inheritance letters, lease agreements, court summons, marriage certificates. A first consultation is usually 30 minutes over Zoom or WhatsApp if you are outside Lahore, or in person at our office. We discuss what happened, what you want (reconciliation, divorce, eviction, possession), and what the court will likely cost in both time and money. We do not give fees by email; they depend on how many court hearings you face and what the other side does.

### Courts and procedure

Township legal work uses these forums:

- [Family Courts Lahore](/courts/family-court-lawyer-lahore) (Aiwan-e-Adal, Mall Road) for matrimonial cases (khula, divorce, custody, maintenance, dower)
- Civil Courts Lahore (Aiwan-e-Adal) for ejectment, declaration suits, specific performance (enforcing a sale), and inheritance partition
- District Courts Lahore for appeals of civil court orders
- [Lahore High Court](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court) for second appeals and writ jurisdiction
- LDA grievance committees for allotment cancellations and arrears disputes

### Why multi-practice matters in Township

A single-practice lawyer in Township may miss overlap. A khula case often involves property (the marital home) and maintenance; a property dispute may require a partition suit if multiple heirs are involved; a tenancy ejectment may touch on boundary disagreement with a neighbour. We handle family law, property, and civil matters together, so you work with counsel who know all angles of your situation. Contact [Saeed Law Firm](/contact) to discuss your case.

### Contact and consultation

Contact us by email (ahmadbilal2003@gmail.com) or phone (+92-319-4959420). We offer Zoom and WhatsApp consultations for clients outside Lahore. If you can send documents beforehand (tenancy agreement, marriage certificate, sale deed, or court papers), we review them and use the live call to explain next steps and what the case will require. Our office is at Y Block, DHA Phase 3, Lahore.

### Frequently asked questions

**Can I get an ejectment order if my tenant stops paying?**
Yes, under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009. You file at Civil Court Lahore and prove non-payment. The court will then order the tenant to quit. If the tenant refuses, you apply for possession through the bailiff. The whole process moves through several court hearings.

**What happens if I paid for a Township plot and the seller won't register it?**
You can file a suit for specific performance under section 12 of the Specific Relief Act 1877 at Civil Court Lahore. The court may order the seller to register the sale. These suits are common in Township and often settle once the seller's legal position becomes risky.

**Where do I file for child custody in Township?**
At the [Family Court, Aiwan-e-Adal](/courts/family-court-lawyer-lahore). The court applies the principle of the child's best interests, guided by Pakistani statute and Islamic law. Children under 7 usually stay with the mother; older children may choose. The case is heard in camera (private).

**My father died and left his Township plot to three of us. How do we sort it out?**
File an inheritance partition suit at Civil Court Lahore. The court divides the plot's shares by Islamic inheritance law. Once the suit is decided, each heir applies for a separate plot or for mutation of the whole plot into joint names. Alternatively, the heirs can settle via a registered partition deed, which is faster. See our [lawyers in Lahore](/lawyers-in-lahore) page for inheritance practice notes.

Not sure where your matter fits? Start with our [Lahore legal hub](/lawyers-in-lahore), then [book a consultation](/contact) and we will point you to the right next step.
